titleStmt.title: SII 24.509: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 509. (A.R. No. 90 of 1936-37.) EAST UTTIRA STREET, VEḶḶAIGŌPURAM, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of 70 varāhan by Kṛishṇappa-Nāyaka, son of Rāṇā Adaṭṭarāya of the Vishuṇuvarddhana-gōtra, for feeding eight Vaishṇavas daily in the temple. The gift was entrusted to Tirumalai Tiruvēṇgaḍa-Tāt tayyaṅgār Tirumalaiyyaṅgār. The details of date viz., Śaka 1512, Vikṛiti Mēsha, śu. 15, Thursday, Viśākha correspond regularly to 1590, A.D. April 9, Thursday; ·79; the nakshatra however was Chitrā till ·38 and Svātī thereafter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 5 100 10 2 Itaṉ melc cellāṉiṉṟa vikṛti samvatsarattu meṣanā
yattu pūrvapakṣattu paurṇamaiyum guruvāsaramum peṟṟa vicāka nakṣatrattu ṉāḷ teṉ
karai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvitivaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkat tiruppati śammarṣaṇa
gotrattu Āpastamba sūtrattu yajuśśākhāddhyāyiyāna tirumalai tiruveṅkaṭat tātta
Ayyaṅkār tirumalaiyyaṅkārukku viṣṇuvarddhana gotrattu (1/2)ṇā Ataṭṭarāyar kumāra
kṛṣṇappaṉāyakkareṉ śrīvaiṣṇava tadiyārādhana śilāśāsanam paṇṇittantapaṭi Iṟṟaiṉā
ḷ śrīraṅganātasvāmi simaiyile tevarīruṭaiya tirumāḷikaiyile ṣṇavar kaḷ
tatāka samarppitta varākaṉ 7 10 Iṉta varākaṉ Eḻupatukkum ṉācciyār koyil caṉṉatiyile Oru taḷikai Oṟṟiyā
kappiṭiccu tinam Eṭṭuttiruṉāmam tevariruṭaiya tirumāḷikaiyile tāṉe Amutu ceyyattakkatākak kaṭṭaḷai
Iṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāka putrapautra paramparaiyāka naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum . Ippaṭikku cilā
śāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ tirumalaiyyaṅkārukku kṛṣṇappaṉāyakkareṉ . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt
ścreyonu pālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanādacyutam padam §
Digital edition of SII 24.509 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
